name: mes-system
description: 项目管理型 MES 系统 — 半导体湿法装备制造执行平台

scripts.dev: npm run prepare:shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run prepare:shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.db:seed: npm run prepare:shared && npm run db:seed --workspace=apps/api
